result.stdout:
Usage: actions [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Synchronizes GitHub Actions Secrets to the specified repository.

Options:
  -r|--repository <string>    "owner/repo" format repository name. (Required)
  -s|--secrets <string>       List of GitHub Actions Secrets to be synchronized. Specify separated by commas, spaces, or newlines. (Required)
